PPR Rendered via Partial Pre-Rendering · Static shell built at 2026-05-29T15:49:08.091Z
The post list is pre-built at build time, served from disk like SSG. The "Trending" widget below is a dynamic hole filled at request time. Both arrive in one HTTP response. Chunk 2 is a tiny inline <script> injected after </html> - browsers execute it anyway. No broken HTML, no external file request.
Shell built at: 2026-05-29T15:49:08.091Z  ·  Dynamic fetched at: waiting...
